subject: [PATCH v2 1/2] nilfs2: fix 64-bit division operations in nilfs_bmap_find_target_in_group()

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: Author seeks review and input from NILFS2 maintainers, but expresses uncertainty about the patch's correctness and suggests deferring to them for guidance.

2026-03-14.patch_summary: Patch author seeks review and potential input from NILFS2 maintainers for a patch fixing 64-bit division operations in nilfs_bmap_find_target_in_group().
